message:
🐛 Fix vitest worker RPC timeout errors in 3 dashboard tests (#1240)

Mock the heavy cardRegistry module in SharedSortableCard, AddCardModal,
and CardFactoryModal tests. These tests only check export existence but
were loading the entire card registry (200+ card bundles), causing
vitest worker RPC timeouts under memory pressure during full suite runs.

Result: 80 test files, 116 tests, 0 errors.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,15 @@
-import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'
+import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest'
+
+// Mock the heavy cardRegistry (pulled in transitively via CardFactoryModal)
+vi.mock('../cards/cardRegistry', () => ({
+  CARD_COMPONENTS: {},
+  DEMO_DATA_CARDS: [],
+  LIVE_DATA_CARDS: [],
+  MODULE_MAP: {},
+  CARD_SIZES: {},
+  registerDynamicCardType: vi.fn(),
+}))
+
 import * as AddCardModalModule from './AddCardModal'
 
 describe('AddCardModal Component', () => {
